name: drift-detect flags fetched_at older than --max-age-days (default 30)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:CURRENT
rules: []
' > rule.yaml
